item_text: user -> userprofile — type=message; label="login"; explanation="user sends a login message to userprofile."
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-002 title: user login module: user login source pages: 1,3 preconditions: user is registered. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user opens the login form. 2. user enters the username "testuser" and password "testpassword". 3. user clicks on the "login" button. 4. user sends a login message to the system with their username and password. 5. system verifies the credentials. 6. system returns true if credentials are correct. expected result: user is logged in successfully.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profile-002 title: update profile module: profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - new name: john doe - new email: john.doe@example.com test steps: 1. user navigates to the profile update page. 2. user enters the new name "john doe" and new email "john.doe@example.com". 3. user clicks on the "update profile" button. 4. userprofile sends an updateprofile message to the user. 5. user updates the profile information. expected result: user profile is updated successfully.
